case_title: DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD VS. LINDA O HALL et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALL, LINDA O $7,733.89 PRINCIPAL, $339.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,073.39, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD SERVED JUL-02-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, LINDA O
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-27-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-27-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-23-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, LINDA O
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-23-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
POS; DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE; UNABLE TO SERVE THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, LINDA O
WAIVER OF ATTORNEYS' FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, LINDA O DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-06-2011
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $339.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, LINDA O
